markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on template production, quality, and strategy for the client.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**$40k Upsell Secured:** The client upsold to a $40k/mo retainer, driven by strong performance signals like 3–4M impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [**Production Backlog Cleared:** Georgemaine cleared a 25-item backlog (15 new, 10 needing copy) in Airtable, which is now the project's single source of truth.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [**Quality is the Bottleneck:** The primary risk to the Jan 26 ramp-up to 10 templates/week is low-quality contractor work that fails to meet the "human-made" standard.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:** The focus will move from pure volume to optimizing existing high-performing content (e.g., e-commerce, visual landing pages) through refreshes and interlinking.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)

## Topics

### Client Performance & Upsell

  - [The client upsold to a $40k/mo retainer.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The upsell was driven by strong performance signals, including 3–4M impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [**Top Performers:** E-commerce and visual landing pages are driving the most conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Megan will provide a detailed performance breakdown to inform future production priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)

### Production Backlog & Process

  - [**Problem:** A backlog of 25 templates was identified in Airtable, which now serves as the project's single source of truth.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [15 templates needed creation.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [10 templates needed copy and file prep.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [**Solution:** Georgemaine cleared the backlog, assigning new portfolio and blog templates to Will in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The backlog stemmed from slow contractor turnaround times (\~1 week per template).](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** Georgemaine will implement stricter deadlines for the contractor to prevent future backlogs.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)

### Contractor Quality & Hiring

  - [**Problem:** Recent contractor work is low quality, failing to meet the "human-made" standard.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [Templates are generic, with minimal changes beyond image swaps.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [**Impact:** This is the primary risk to the Jan 26 ramp-up to 10 templates/week.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [**Hiring Efforts:**](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [George will escalate the search for new contractors with Marilia.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
      - [Georgemaine will source candidates from their network.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [Georgemaine will record a template-creation tutorial to set a clear quality benchmark for new hires.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)

### Technical Updates & Workflow

  - [**Publishing Bot:** Nicolas confirmed the bot is working, with a new end-to-end workflow for "tools" now live.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**Guides:** Nicolas has 4–6 guides ready to be pushed.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [**Tools Templates:** Megan will provide a curated list of 10 priority tool keywords from Airtable to guide Nicolas's production.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)

### Strategic Direction

  - [The strategy will shift from pure volume to optimizing high-performing content.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [Refresh and enrich top-performing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [Interlink guides and templates to create a cohesive content portfolio.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Megan will schedule a meeting with George and Will to plan this new editorial strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)

### Meeting Logistics

  - [Will will be invited to future syncs for better context.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [George will attend the Tuesday client meeting to meet new team members, including the technical SEO, Tom.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

      - [Escalate the search for new contractors with Marilia.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the new template page.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [**Nicolas:**](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [Update templates in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/c17a9w3RJJVLQYk5N3ReAz1VU3jxkWZv?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
